package service

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"

	"example.com/app/handler"
	"example.com/app/model"
)

// Positive scenario for service_calls_handler_helper: service reaches upward
// into handler helpers for parsing, rendering, or gin-specific utilities.
type AccountService struct {
	repo AccountRepository
}

type AccountRepository interface {
	FindByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*model.Account, error)
}

func NewAccountService(repo AccountRepository) *AccountService {
	return &AccountService{repo: repo}
}

func (s *AccountService) GetAccount(ctx context.Context, id string) (string, error) {
	acct, err := s.repo.FindByID(ctx, id)
	if err != nil {
		return "", fmt.Errorf("account not found: %w", err)
	}

	resp := handler.FormatAccountResponse(acct)

	jsonBytes, err := handler.MarshalToJSON(resp)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	return string(jsonBytes), nil
}
